lobe.name: Svrn7.UX
lobe.title: SVRN7 UX LOBE
lobe.description: Platform-specific user interface adapter. The boundary between the TDA DIDComm ecosystem and the citizen-facing UI layer. Translates TDA events (balance updates, notifications, registration confirmations) into platform UI calls, and packages citizen-initiated actions (transfers, registrations) into DIDComm messages. Epoch 0 rendering is console-based; implementors replace Render-* functions with platform-appropriate UI.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Balance Update
protocols.description: Inbound notification that a citizen wallet balance has changed. Body: { citizenDid, balanceGrana }

protocols.title: UX Notification
protocols.description: Inbound alert to surface to the citizen. Body: { alertType, severity, message, resourceDid }

protocols.title: Registration Complete
protocols.description: Inbound confirmation of successful citizen onboarding. Body: { success, citizenDid, societyDid, endowmentGrana, endowmentVcId }

cmdlets.name: Render-TdaBalanceUpdate
cmdlets.title: Render Balance Update
cmdlets.description: Renders a wallet balance change notification to the citizen UX device. Platform-specific rendering; replace with actual UI call in production.

cmdlets.name: Render-TdaNotification
cmdlets.title: Render Notification
cmdlets.description: Surfaces a TDA alert to the citizen UX device. Severity maps to UI treatment (Critical=red, Warning=yellow, Info=white).

cmdlets.name: Render-TdaRegistrationComplete
cmdlets.title: Render Registration Complete
cmdlets.description: Displays onboarding confirmation: new DID, Society membership, endowment amount.

cmdlets.name: New-TdaTransferIntent
cmdlets.title: Package Transfer Intent
cmdlets.description: Packages a citizen-initiated transfer into a DIDComm transfer/1.0/request OutboundMessage for the Switchboard to deliver.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly.
ai.summary: Platform adapter between the TDA DIDComm ecosystem and the citizen-facing UI. The only LOBE that communicates with a DEVICE element (DSA 0.24). Render-* functions are platform stubs in Epoch 0.
useCases: Display real-time balance updates to a citizen CLI or web interface
Surface TDA alerts (overdraft, VC expiry, transfer completion) to citizen UX
Package citizen-initiated transfers into the DIDComm transfer pipeline
compositionHints: Render-TdaBalanceUpdate is called after any Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer that changes a citizen balance
New-TdaTransferIntent is the entry point for citizen-initiated transfers from a UI; pipe its output to Send-TdaMessage
Render-TdaRegistrationComplete should be called after receiving an onboard/1.0/receipt with success=true
limitations: Epoch 0: rendering is console output only. Replace Render-* function bodies with platform-specific UI calls.
New-TdaTransferIntent does not sign the transfer — signing is performed by the Society TDA after receipt.
